positive: A vibrant, stylized bioluminescent cosmic forest scene. Silhouettes of delicate, oversized flora and fauna (like glowing fox shapes and fern fronds) arranged in a perfect central composition. The background features a deep indigo nebula gradient intersecting with bursts of warm, ethereal starlight and milky way dust. Use strong contrast between the dark, matte foreground silhouettes and the vivid, glowing cyan, magenta, and lime green bioluminescent accents. Minimalist, high-contrast vector style with soft glow effects, perfect for apparel printing. Focus on clean lines and scalable design.
negative: blurry, low resolution, grainy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, grayscale, amateur, messy, complex background details, photorealism
